metadata.title: nanoPDF — Free & Fast PDF Compression
metadata.description: Compress PDF files from your phone. Free, fast, no signup. Up to 50MB per file.

home.heroSubtitle: Compress PDFs, convert images to PDF — right from your phone browser. No signup.
home.compressCardDescription: Reduce PDF file size while keeping quality. Three levels to choose from.
home.imageToPdfCardDescription: Convert JPG and PNG images into a single PDF in seconds.
home.mergeCardDescription: Combine multiple PDF files into one, in the order you choose.
home.splitCardDescription: Extract specific pages from a PDF into a new file.
home.rotateCardDescription: Rotate every page of a PDF by 90, 180, or 270 degrees.

compress.title: Compress PDF files
compress.subtitle: Drop files here or tap to choose. Up to 5 files, 50MB each.
compress.dropzoneIdle: Tap here or drop PDF files

imageToPdf.title: Convert images to PDF
imageToPdf.subtitle: Pick JPG, PNG, or WEBP images and we'll merge them into one PDF.
imageToPdf.errorWrongType: Only JPG, PNG, and WEBP accepted

install.ctaAndroid: Install nanoPDF on your phone for quick access
install.ctaIos: To install: tap the Share button, then "Add to Home Screen"

merge.title: Merge PDF files
merge.subtitle: Pick two or more PDFs. We'll merge them in the order you uploaded.
merge.dropzoneIdle: Tap here or drop PDF files

split.title: Split a PDF
split.subtitle: Choose which pages to extract into a new PDF.
split.dropzoneIdle: Tap here or drop a PDF
split.pageSpecHelp: Use commas to separate and dashes for ranges
split.errorInvalidSpec: Invalid page format or out of range

rotate.title: Rotate PDF pages
rotate.subtitle: Pick the rotation angle to apply to every page.
rotate.dropzoneIdle: Tap here or drop a PDF
